message:
refactor: decompose compression gate evaluate(), harden division and error propagation across gates

Break the monolithic CompressionResidualGate::evaluate() into
build_receipt(), record_pass_results(), and commit_receipt() to fix
triple-recorded ledger entries in evaluate_all_surfaces() and propagate
ledger-full errors instead of silently ignoring them. Add new public
accessors claims_with_caveats() and claims_insufficient().

Replace manual division-by-zero guards with checked_div().unwrap_or(0)
in regexp_string_governance_gate (4 call sites: StringParityEvidence,
RegExpParityEvidence, TailRiskRecord, GateSummary). Remove dead code
in evaluate_unicode() that returned the same value in both branches,
and simplify the redundant triple-branch verdict logic in
hostcall_session_governance_gate to a single GateVerdict::Fail arm.

Adopt let-chain syntax (if let ... &&) in adversarial_supremacy and
hostcall_session gates. Add explicit .clone() for ContentHash in
transfer and vectorized lane gates to fix move-after-use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
